title: Author interaction-schemas family v0.1.0 — typed relationships between substrate-IMDB entities with chronon-bounded validity
description:
Per substrate-imdb-of-people-characters-personas-across-hilbert-timelines Concept (mono f3b55630c7). Substrate currently expresses interactions via cross-vault LinkRefs scattered across substrateBindings fields, but interactions are NOT first-class records.

Family contents:
- InteractionModel — slug, kind (collaboration | conflict | mentorship | marriage | institutional-overlap | doctrinal-binding | succession | etc.), participantsRefs (LinkRef[] to People/Characters/Personas/Organizations), startChrononID, endChrononID (optional, null = ongoing), strengthOrdinal (1-5), substrateRelevance, evidenceRefs.
- InteractionKindOrdinalityTable — closed-condensable catalog of interaction kinds.

First-instance records to materialize after family lands:
- interactions/rismay-jessica-institutional-overlap.json (Andover + Bucknell shared trajectory)
- interactions/pg-sama-yc-succession.json (HN item 1 → YC president handoff 2014)
- interactions/pg-jessica-yc-co-founding.json (2005 co-founding + 2008 marriage)
- interactions/vash-substrate-doctrine-binding.json (bastards-for-peace-and-love)
- interactions/tony-stark-substrate-doctrine-binding.json (substrate-quantizes-googles-hilbert-space parallel)
- interactions/substrate-yc-engagement.json (a16z Speedrun pitch context)
- interactions/curry-pg-yc-naming-binding.json (1940s Y combinator → 2005 YC name)

Closure: family lands; 7+ instance records lands; substrate-IMDB query 'find all worldline-crossings between rismay and Jessica Livingston' returns typed records, not implicit prose; LDT proof asserts chronon-bounded validity (start < end when both set).

Deferred to next session per restart-imminent state.
